description: You are a sales representative at a wholesale manufacturing distributor preparing for a Q1 product launch campaign. Create a Target List in SuiteCRM named 'Q1 2025 Enterprise Outreach' (Type: Default) with the description 'Target list for Q1 2025 product launch campaign targeting key enterprise client contacts'. Add the following three existing enterprise client contacts to this list: Margaret Chen (VP of Procurement at Acme Industrial Corp), David Rodriguez (IT Director at TechGlobal Solutions), and Sarah Williams (Operations Manager at Pacific Northwest Manufacturing).
